1.name: The Eyes of the Serpent
references: The Players Guide Pg. 123

1.name: Enchanted Gaze
references: Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 252

2.name: The Tongue of the Asp
2.description: Grow a extended tongue that serves as a weapon
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages Pg. 163
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 209

2.name: The Tongue of the Serpent
references: The Players Guide Pg. 124

2.name: Typhonic Maw
2.description: Extend the jaws up to the chest, as well as growing pointed teeth and a forked tongue
references: Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 252

3.name: Mummify
3.description: Go into a torpor-like state and be nearly indestructible
references: The Players Guide Pg. 124

3.name: Serpent's Flesh
3.description: The vampire becomes more flexible and her skin toughens
references: Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 252

3.name: Skin of the Adder
3.description: Grow hardened monstrous skin that protects you
references: Vampire: The Masquerade Revised Edition Pg. 177

3.name: The Skin of the Adder
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 210

3.name: Bitumenous Flesh
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages Pg. 163

4.name: The Form of the Cobra
4.description: Transform into a large venomous snake
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages Pg. 163
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 210

4.name: Form of the Serpent
references: The Players Guide Pg. 124

4.name: Typhonic Avatar
4.description: Assume the form of the "Typhonic Beast", either as an animal or as a human-animal hybrid
references: Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 252

5.name: Cheat the Scale of Anubis
5.description: Remove your heart, making you immune to staking, or remove all your organs and become nearly indestructible
references: Dark Ages: Vampire Rulebook Pg. 211

5.name: Cheat Thoth's Scales
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages Pg. 163

5.name: The Heart of Darkness
5.description: Remove your heart from your body, making you immune to staking
references: The Players Guide Pg. 124
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 210

5.name: Mother of Monsters
5.description: Spawn monsters from your own flesh that act as your servants
references: Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 253

6.name: Aspect of the God
references: Players Guide to Low Clans Pg. 156

6.name: Breath of the Basilisk
6.description: Exhale a poisoning and corrosive mist
references: Vampire: The Dark Ages Pg. 163

6.name: Breathe the Sandstorm
6.description: Exhale a scorching blast of sand
references: Dark Ages: Vampire Rulebook Pg. 212

6.name: Cobra Fangs
6.description: Grow the venomous fangs of the cobra without having to transform
references: Clanbook: Followers of Set Revised Pg. 66
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 211

6.name: Obsession
6.description: Fill someone with lust for an object or condition
references: The Players Guide Pg. 124

6.name: Ophidian Infestation
6.description: Consume someone from the inside by snakes
references: Dark Ages Companion Pg. 91

6.name: Temptation
6.description: Tempt someone into committing evil actions
references: The Players Guide Pg. 124

6.name: Typhonic Beast
6.description: Transform into the Typhonic Animal (also possible as a Combination Discipline)
references: Clanbook: Followers of Set Revised Pg. 69

6.name: Echidna's Venom
references: Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 254

7.name: Divine Image
7.description: Take on the physical and mental strengths of a deity
references: Clanbook: Followers of Set Revised Pg. 66
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 211

7.name: Form of the Storm
7.description: Transform your body into wind and clouds, battering your surroundings
references: Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 254

7.name: Phobia
7.description: Make someone irrationally afraid of something
references: The Players Guide Pg. 124

7.name: Seed of Corruption
7.description: Slowly erode someone's morals and raise suppressed desires to the surface
references: Players Guide to Low Clans Pg. 157

7.name: Set's Curse
7.description: Transform someone's body and mind into a snake that acts as your servant
references: Dark Ages Companion Pg. 91

8.name: Apep's Semblance
8.description: Transform into a large snake-human hybrid
references: Dark Ages Companion Pg. 92

8.name: Body of the Great Lord Set
8.description: Take on a form and powers comparable to Set's
references: Players Guide to Low Clans Pg. 158

8.name: Cerberus's Fury
8.description: Grow two additional heads that can see wraiths
references: Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 254

8.name: Corruption
8.description: Make someone addicted to sadistic acts
references: The Players Guide Pg. 125

8.name: Heart Thief
8.description: Rip another vampire's heart from their body
references: Clanbook: Followers of Set Revised Pg. 67
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 211

9.name: Form of Corruption
9.description: Create an object that makes people addicted to sadistic acts
references: The Players Guide Pg. 125

9.name: Godhead
9.description: Assume a form comparable to one of the divine forms of the Aeons
references: Vampire Twentieth Anniversary Edition: The Dark Ages Pg. 254

9.name: Pact with Ra
9.description: Walk in the sun without harm for one day
references: Players Guide to Low Clans Pg. 158

9.name: Shadow of Apep
9.description: Become a nearly indestructible giant snake of pure darkness
references: Clanbook: Followers of Set Revised Pg. 67
Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 212

10.name: Mark of Damnation
10.description: Make someone so hideous they will be attacked by anyone who sees them
references: The Players Guide Pg. 125

10.name: Plot Device
references: Gehenna Pg. 182
